xs_sm.layout: Full-screen conversation view, chat list hidden (navigation via back button)

lg_xl_xxl.detail_panel: User profile, shared media, pinned messages

xs_sm.layout: Full-screen list view with floating action button for new conversation

lg_xl_xxl.layout: Center column (600px max) with sidebar navigation and suggestions

xs_sm.layout: Horizontal swipeable columns, one visible at a time

md.layout: Two columns visible with horizontal scroll

all_viewports.navigation: Tap left/right halves on mobile, arrow keys on desktop
all_viewports.progress_bar: Top of screen, segmented by story count

xs_sm.month_view: Compact grid with dot indicators only (no event text)

md.month_view: Standard grid with truncated event text

gesture_keyboard_parity.principle: Every gesture interaction MUST have a keyboard equivalent

mappings.keyboard: Shift+Left Arrow or context menu → Reply
Shift+Right Arrow or context menu → Forward
Space to grab, Arrow keys to move, Space to drop

chat_timeline.virtualization: Required — only render visible messages + 10 buffer above/below

feed_cards.media_preload: Preload next 2 items in scroll direction
feed_cards.video_autoplay: Only when >50% visible, muted by default

planner_board.virtualization: Required within columns if card count > 50

requirements: All interactive elements must be focusable and operable via keyboard
Color contrast ratio minimum 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text
Focus indicators visible with minimum 2px outline
All images and media must have alt text or aria-label
Dynamic content updates announced via aria-live regions
Reduced motion: respect prefers-reduced-motion media query — disable animations
High contrast: respect prefers-contrast media query — increase borders and reduce gradients
Screen reader testing required with VoiceOver (iOS/macOS) and TalkBack (Android) and NVDA (Windows)

rtl_support.requirement: All components must support RTL layout via dir='rtl' attribute
rules: Use logical CSS properties (margin-inline-start vs margin-left)
Mirror horizontal icons (arrows, chevrons) but NOT symmetric icons (search, settings)
Chat bubbles: self-messages on left in RTL, other-messages on right
Swipe directions reversed in RTL mode
Text alignment follows content direction, not fixed
